source.name: Lab 3.5: Complete Your Agent for Training
source.instructions:
To pass this assessment, all of the following checks must pass:

• Check 1: Domain has utter_hours and utter_balance with the required handout text.
• Check 2: data/basics/hours.yml exists with flow 'hours' and step utter_hours.
• Check 3: data/basics/balance.yml exists with flow 'balance' and step utter_balance.

sequence.feedback: Domain has utter_hours and utter_balance with the required handout text.
data/basics/hours.yml exists with flow 'hours' and step utter_hours.
data/basics/balance.yml exists with flow 'balance' and step utter_balance.
